panels.title: Token Usage by Provider and Model (5m)

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(created_at, '5m'), concat(provider, ' / ', model) AS metric, COALESCE(sum(total_tokens), 0)::double precision AS "Total Tokens" FROM llm_usage_events WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) AND COALESCE(usage_metadata->> 'usage_kind', '') <> 'audio' GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1, 2

targets.expr: sum(count_over_time({compose_project="hragent-05", service="backend", level=~"(?i)(error|critical|exception|fatal)"} |~ "(?i)(documents\\.text\\.failed|guidance.*failed|rehearsal.*failed|reports?.*failed|coach.*failed|复盘生成失败|redis.*failed)" [5m])) or vector(0)

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(u.display_name, ''), CASE WHEN e.user_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'User ' || left(e.user_id::text, 8) ELSE 'Unknown' END) AS "User", COALESCE(sum(e.input_tokens), 0)::bigint AS "Input Tokens", COALESCE(sum(e.output_tokens), 0)::bigint AS "Output Tokens", COALESCE(sum(e.total_tokens), 0)::bigint AS "Total Tokens", count(*)::bigint AS "LLM Calls", max(e.created_at) AS "Last Used At" FROM llm_usage_events e LEFT JOIN app_users u ON u.id = e.user_id WHERE $__timeFilter(e.created_at) GROUP BY e.user_id, u.display_name ORDER BY "Total Tokens" DESC, "User" ASC
SELECT COALESCE(sum(input_tokens), 0)::bigint AS "Input Tokens" FROM llm_usage_events WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at)
SELECT COALESCE(sum(output_tokens), 0)::bigint AS "Output Tokens" FROM llm_usage_events WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at)
SELECT COALESCE(sum(COALESCE(input_tokens, 0) + COALESCE(output_tokens, 0)), 0)::bigint AS "Total Tokens" FROM llm_usage_events WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at)

panels.title: Known Total Cost
panels.description: 单位：人民币。合计 DeepSeek V4-Pro、qwen3-rerank、text-embedding-v3 与已知 ASR 费用；Ollama 本地模型不计成本。

targets.rawSql: SELECT round(COALESCE(sum(CASE WHEN lower(model) = 'deepseek-v4-pro' THEN (GREATEST(COALESCE(input_tokens, 0) - COALESCE(cached_tokens, 0), 0) * 12.0 + COALESCE(cached_tokens, 0) * 1.0 + COALESCE(output_tokens, 0) * 24.0) / 1000000.0 WHEN lower(model) IN ('qwen3-rerank', 'text-embedding-v3') THEN COALESCE(input_tokens, total_tokens, 0) * 0.5 / 1000000.0 ELSE 0 END + COALESCE(NULLIF(usage_metadata->> 'cost_cny', '')::numeric, 0)), 0), 6) AS "Cost (¥)" FROM llm_usage_events WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at)

panels.title: Usage and Cost by User and Model
panels.description: 每位用户包含各 Provider/模型明细及 TOTAL 汇总行；Ollama 本地模型保留用量，费用为 0。

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(u.display_name, ''), CASE WHEN e.user_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'User ' || left(e.user_id::text, 8) ELSE 'Unknown' END) AS "User", CASE WHEN GROUPING(e.provider) = 1 THEN 'TOTAL' ELSE e.provider END AS "Provider", CASE WHEN GROUPING(e.model) = 1 THEN 'TOTAL' ELSE e.model END AS "Model", COALESCE(sum(e.input_tokens), 0)::bigint AS "Input Tokens", COALESCE(sum(e.output_tokens), 0)::bigint AS "Output Tokens", COALESCE(sum(e.total_tokens), 0)::bigint AS "Total Tokens", round(COALESCE(sum(CASE WHEN lower(e.model) = 'deepseek-v4-pro' THEN (GREATEST(COALESCE(e.input_tokens, 0) - COALESCE(e.cached_tokens, 0), 0) * 12.0 + COALESCE(e.cached_tokens, 0) * 1.0 + COALESCE(e.output_tokens, 0) * 24.0) / 1000000.0 WHEN lower(e.model) IN ('qwen3-rerank', 'text-embedding-v3') THEN COALESCE(e.input_tokens, e.total_tokens, 0) * 0.5 / 1000000.0 ELSE 0 END + COALESCE(NULLIF(e.usage_metadata->> 'cost_cny', '')::numeric, 0)), 0), 6) AS "Cost (¥)", max(e.created_at) AS "Last Used At" FROM llm_usage_events e LEFT JOIN app_users u ON u.id = e.user_id WHERE $__timeFilter(e.created_at) GROUP BY GROUPING SETS ((e.user_id, u.display_name, e.provider, e.model), (e.user_id, u.display_name)) ORDER BY "User" ASC, GROUPING(e.provider) DESC, "Total Tokens" DESC, "Provider" ASC, "Model" ASC

SELECT e.provider AS "Provider", e.model AS "Model", round(COALESCE(sum(NULLIF(e.usage_metadata->> 'audio_seconds', '')::numeric), 0), 3) AS "Audio Seconds", round(COALESCE(sum(NULLIF(e.usage_metadata->> 'cost_cny', '')::numeric), 0), 6) AS "Cost (¥)", count(*)::bigint AS "Requests", max(e.created_at) AS "Last Used At" FROM llm_usage_events e WHERE $__timeFilter(e.created_at) AND e.usage_metadata->> 'usage_kind' = 'audio' GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY "Audio Seconds" DESC

panels.title: Usage and Cost by Provider and Model

targets.rawSql: SELECT e.provider AS "Provider", e.model AS "Model", COALESCE(sum(e.input_tokens), 0)::bigint AS "Input Tokens", COALESCE(sum(e.output_tokens), 0)::bigint AS "Output Tokens", COALESCE(sum(e.total_tokens), 0)::bigint AS "Total Tokens", count(*)::bigint AS "Calls", round(COALESCE(sum(CASE WHEN lower(e.model) = 'deepseek-v4-pro' THEN (GREATEST(COALESCE(e.input_tokens, 0) - COALESCE(e.cached_tokens, 0), 0) * 12.0 + COALESCE(e.cached_tokens, 0) * 1.0 + COALESCE(e.output_tokens, 0) * 24.0) / 1000000.0 WHEN lower(e.model) IN ('qwen3-rerank', 'text-embedding-v3') THEN COALESCE(e.input_tokens, e.total_tokens, 0) * 0.5 / 1000000.0 ELSE 0 END + COALESCE(NULLIF(e.usage_metadata->> 'cost_cny', '')::numeric, 0)), 0), 6) AS "Cost (¥)", max(e.created_at) AS "Last Used At" FROM llm_usage_events e WHERE $__timeFilter(e.created_at) GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY "Total Tokens" DESC, "Provider" ASC
